generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring the drive current of the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotSensorStream
]

instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing angle measurements of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotSensorStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox encoder delivering angle measurements after the gearwheel and cycloidal gearboxes."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotSensorStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiveRobotSensorStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Live MQTT stream of sensor data from the robot: motor current I_M, motor and gearbox angles, and derived torque, angular velocity, acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

// C10: Data (raw and derived)
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current (I_M) values received from LiveRobotSensorStream."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angle measurements (motor and gearbox) extracted from LiveRobotSensorStream."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque computed from motor current and angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity obtained by differentiating angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration obtained by differentiating angular velocity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values produced by friction models in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity generated by Simulink friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular acceleration generated by Simulink friction models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotSensorStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo WebDashboardEnabler
]

// C10: Models (Simulink friction models)
instance FrictionlessSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the first axis without any friction terms."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Simulink model implementing Coulomb and viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance StribeckSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model incorporating the Stribeck effect for speed‑dependent friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance DahlSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of the Dahl friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance LuGreSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink realization of the LuGre dynamic friction model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SimulinkEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment used for friction model simulation and parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, SimulationComparisonService, ModelUpdateGenerationService, RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling live sensor data transport from the robot to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard component that visualizes live and simulated data streams."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationDashboard
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing standardized identification of robot components."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying measured and simulated torque, velocity, and acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationVsMeasuredComparisonInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersIdentifiedInsight, UpdateControllerTuningAction
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares simulated friction model outputs with measured data to assess model fidelity."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationVsMeasuredComparisonInsight
]

instance ModelUpdateGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates updated friction models for controller tuning based on identified parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateUpdatedFrictionModelAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersIdentifiedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) identified from the live sensor stream."
]

instance SimulationVsMeasuredComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating the degree of agreement between simulated and measured torque/velocity/acceleration."
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateControllerTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically feed identified friction parameters back to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateUpdatedFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Create updated friction model files for use in the controller tuning process."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow follows a one‑way data flow and does not send commands back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation during robot motion, with data traces updated at the sensor sampling rate (unspecified, but streamed live)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical robot axis with sensors → MQTT broker → processing components (simulation models) → data traces stored in the digital shadow → visualization dashboard; all components linked by the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is running to continuously identify friction and improve control accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Combination of white‑box analytical friction models and black‑box data‑driven models; continuous online identification to capture wear, temperature, load effects; traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated outputs with measured reference data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used to stream sensor measurements from the robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shell (AAS) aligns with Industry 4.0 standards; SysML modeling follows OMG standards."
]
